name: Capstone Copper Corp.
analysis: CSC's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 12% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$15.7200, stop A$12.6522, target A$17.8300 (0.69:1) — then trail it.
